channel.title: The K-Beauty Data Desk
channel.description: I read all the reviews so you don't have to. Honest, data-backed takes on Korea's best-selling skincare.

item.title: 메디힐 Serum 40+: What 41,773 Real Reviews Actually Say (2026)
item.description: 메디힐 Serum 40+: 4.7★ from 41,773 Korean reviews (82% five-star). Who it suits, who should skip, and where to buy.

item.title: Anua PDRN Hyaluronic Acid Capsule 100 Serum Mask: What 18,867 Real Reviews Actually Say (2026)
Anua PDRN Hyaluronic Acid Hydra Capsule Mist: What 5,559 Real Reviews Actually Say (2026)
